Capabilities

One agent, the full top of funnel

YUNA handles the repetitive sales work end to end, so your team spends time on conversations that close.

Prospecting

Find high-quality leads automatically across millions of companies and contacts.

Qualification

Identify real buyers using AI signals like intent, fit, and recent activity.

Outreach

Send personalized messages at scale that read like they were written by a person.

Scheduling

Book meetings directly to your calendar, with reminders and follow-ups handled.

How it works

Pipeline on autopilot, in three steps

Tell YUNA who you want to reach. She does the rest and shows up where you already work.

1 Define

Define your target customer

Describe your ideal buyer — industry, role, company size, and signals that matter.

SaaS50–500 employeesHead of SalesSeries A–CHiring SDRsNorth America
2 Engage

YUNA finds & contacts them

She sources matching accounts, researches each one, and sends tailored outreach.

94%
88%
81%
3 Close

Meetings appear on your calendar

Qualified replies turn into booked meetings — no back-and-forth from your team.

Inside YUNA

A team of specialists, working as one

YUNA coordinates focused sub-agents, each great at one job — so the whole pipeline runs smoothly and reliably.

Lead Finder

Sources accounts and contacts that match your criteria.

Researcher

Gathers context and buying signals on every prospect.

Outreach Writer

Crafts personalized messages and times every follow-up.

Scheduler

Negotiates times and books meetings on your calendar.

Pricing

Simple plans that scale with you

Start free. Upgrade as your pipeline grows. No long-term contracts.

Starter
$3/mo
For founders testing outbound for the first time.
  • Up to 500 leads / month
  • Automated outreach & follow-up
  • 1 calendar integration
  • Email support
Most popular
Growth
$30/mo
For teams ready to build a repeatable pipeline.
  • Up to 3,000 leads / month
  • AI qualification & intent signals
  • CRM & calendar integrations
  • Priority support
Scale
Custom
For revenue teams running outbound at volume.
  • Unlimited leads
  • Custom sub-agent workflows
  • SSO, SLA & data controls
  • Dedicated success manager
